title: Build AI career prediction chatbot with Internet Identity authentication

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication system with login and signup functionality allowing users to authenticate using passkeys or social accounts

quotes: login details should be placed so the user can login or signup

acceptanceCriteria: Users can sign up using Internet Identity
Users can log in using Internet Identity
Authentication state persists across sessions
Unauthenticated users are prompted to log in before accessing chat features

requirements.text: Create a chat interface where authenticated users can input their career ideas and questions

quotes: ai chat box, where we give our ideas about our career

acceptanceCriteria: Chat interface displays user messages and AI responses
Users can type and submit career-related questions
Chat history is visible in a scrollable conversation view
Interface clearly distinguishes between user and AI messages

requirements.text: Implement backend logic to process career-related questions and generate AI-powered future predictions and career guidance based on user input

quotes: it gives the output using future predictions

acceptanceCriteria: Backend receives user career questions
Backend generates relevant career predictions and guidance
Responses are contextual and related to the user's input
Backend stores chat history per authenticated user

requirements.text: Design a beautiful, modern frontend with a professional color scheme and typography that creates a welcoming, trustworthy atmosphere for career guidance, avoiding blue and purple tones

quotes: the front end shoule be very beautiful

acceptanceCriteria: UI uses a cohesive, modern color palette that conveys professionalism
Typography is clean and readable
Layout is intuitive and user-friendly
Design creates a welcoming atmosphere appropriate for career counseling

requirements.text: Create and display a distinctive logo for the career prediction website that appears on the landing page and throughout the application

quotes: front end website should have some logo

acceptanceCriteria: Logo is prominently displayed on the landing page
Logo appears in the navigation or header area
Logo design is professional and relevant to career guidance
Logo is consistently sized and positioned across pages

requirements.text: Integrate generated logo and any supporting visual assets as static files in the frontend public assets directory
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are stored in frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are properly referenced in frontend components
Images load correctly in the browser

constraints: Use React with TypeScript for frontend, not vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript
Use Internet Identity for authentication, not email-based verification
Do not attempt to integrate external AI APIs or LLM services
nonGoals: Integration with external AI services like OpenAI or Anthropic

required: Professional logo for career prediction AI platform featuring modern, abstract design elements suggesting growth and future vision (logo.dim_400x400.png)
